FACTORY DIRECT

THE BEAUTY OF PRACTICAL MANUFACTURING CERTAINTY.

RayFancy focuses on reliable wall switches and electrical accessories for overseas distributors, contractors, brand owners, and OEM customers.

SCROLL TO EXPLORE

PURE RELIABILITY.

offline_pin

Practical Product Range

Wall switches, sockets, plugs, power strips, and lighting accessories can support different channel needs.

verified

Factory Communication

Samples, order quantities, color options, and packaging requirements can be confirmed before production.

touch_app

Long-Term Cooperation

The "click" of a RayFancy switch is tuned to a specific frequency—providing sensory confirmation that is missing from touchscreens.

BUILT FROM REAL FACTORY CAPABILITY.

PRODUCT PHOTOS. FACTORY SCENES. PRACTICAL SUPPLY SUPPORT.

COPPER PARTS

Conductive components and electrical accessory details for product supply.

INJECTION WORKSHOP

Manufacturing scenes that support repeatable production and order fulfillment.

PACKING WORKSHOP

Packaging coordination for distributors and OEM-style supply.

THE CHRONICLE

FROM SAMPLE CONFIRMATION TO REPEAT ORDERS.

01

The First Forge

Confirm product type, target market, finish, packaging needs, and estimated quantity.

02

The Domestic Shift

Review product appearance, basic function, packaging, and order details before bulk production.

03

Material Renaissance

RayFancy introduces specialized ceramic and rare metal finishes, defying the global trend toward plastic components.

04

The Silent Majority

Build repeatable channel supply around stable products, direct response, and practical cooperation.

THE A6 SERIES.

A practical wall switch and socket series for distributor catalogs, project matching, and OEM packaging programs.

  • Cycle Rating Switches / Sockets
  • Response Time Factory Direct
  • Warranty Logo / Packaging
RAYFANCY

ARCHITECTURAL QUALITY FOR GENERATIONS. WE BELIEVE IN THE PERMANENCE OF PHYSICAL DESIGN OVER THE TRANSIENCE OF DIGITAL TRENDS.
